intro: A jagged rift shimmers in the void, its edges crackling with unfamiliar light.
title: Ultra Wormhole
description: The rift hums with pulling force. Step through and it will fling your team onward to somewhere new. Or leave it well alone.

1.label: Step through
1.tooltip: (~) Forces your next destination to a random nearby place
1.selected: You step into the shimmering rift, and the world folds away...

2.label: Back away
2.selected: You back away from the rift and let it crackle on alone.

flung: The wormhole flings you onward! Your next destination has changed.
closed: The rift seals shut before it can take you anywhere.
